items.title: Multi-mixer discovery and state inventory for AI context provision
Show preparation from rider documents (input list, patch plan, scene checklist)
Soundcheck assistance via read-only mixer diagnostics
Routing validation between FOH and stagebox mixer units
Safety constraint: no autonomous live mixing by AI agents
ADR-001: Use TypeScript/Node.js 20+ as implementation language
ADR-002: Three-layer architecture (Raw PreSonus → Normalized domain model → MCP surface)
ADR-003: pnpm monorepo with four packages (domain, adapter, inspector, mcp-server)
ADR-004: Use @featherbear/presonus-studiolive-api v1.8.0 as hardware adapter (pinned)
ADR-005: Read-only-first policy; write operations require explicit change-set gate
ARC-C-001: presonus-domain package — Zod schemas for normalized mixer domain model
ARC-C-002: presonus-adapter package — featherbear wrapper, state cache, meter summarizer
ARC-C-003: presonus-inspector package — probe CLI for hardware reconnaissance
ARC-C-004: presonus-mcp-server package — MCP resources, tools, prompts
